titleStmt.title: SII 41.218: original edition by S. Rajagopal

No. 218. (A.R. No. 436 & 437 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the east and north walls of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Viraṭṭānēśvara temple at Tiruttaṇi.

p.hi: Chōḻa, Rajēndra Chōḻa I, Year 10 = 1022 A.D.

summary.p: Much damaged. Inscriptions AR. No. 436 & 437 of 1905 together from one inscription. Gift of gold for burning a perpetual lamp in the Subramaniyap-piḻḻaiyār temple at Tiruttaṇiyal alias Jananāthachaturvēdimaṅgalam by one Tillai Irāmaṉ of Kāvēripākkam, alias Parichana-chintāmaṇichaturvedimaṅgalam in Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam. The gift of money was entrusted with the sabhā of Tiruttaṇiyal, who set apart some land income for the lamp service. Another gift of 90 sheep was madeby the paṇimagan Pāmbuni-kiḻān, who was supervising (kaḍaikkāṇum) the local affairs.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi neṭuntuyalūḻiyuḷiṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭar vaṉavelippaṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻmatiṭk koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟk karumaraṇmaṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭaliḻa n=tiranāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻuvatu meṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum kulatanamā
kiya palar pukaḻ laracukaḷaikaṭṭa paracirāman melvaruñ cāntimattivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttakumuṭiyum payaṅkoṭupa
ḻimika netikulapperumalaikaḷumāpporutaṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakecari varmarāna śrīrājentracoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇ
ṭalattu meṉmalaittaṇiyal nāṭṭuc caṉanātacaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattukkāvirippākkamāṉa paricaṉacintāmaṇic caruppeti maṅkalameṉṟaḷave taṇiyal nāṭṭuc canaṉātaccaruppetimaṅkalattiṟ piḷḷaiyār subrahmaṇyadevar koyi
vattavana ṇṭa tillaiirāman pakkalt tiruttaṇiyalil sabhaiyār koṇṭa pon Eḻukaḻañcemukkāl Ipponnukkuk kālppolicaikkāka(ka) cantirātittavaṟ Ittevarkku Erippatāna tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku caṉaṉātaccaruppeti maṅkalattu
vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñcaturam Eṭṭumāvil kiḻmelāṉa paḻavatikku vaṭakku tirumalai subrahmaṇyadevar nilattukku meṟkum nilam muṉṟumāmukkāṇi muntirikaiyil kiḻkkaṭaiyaṉilam Iraṇṭu māviṉāl kuḻi Āyirattirupattu nāṉ
tom cavaiyom Ittevarkke ceṉaṉātaccaruppetimaṅkalattuccavaiyāraikkoṇṭu kaṭaikkāṇkiṟa paṇimakaṉ pāmpuṇi kiḻāṉ vaippitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟum Ivvāṭukaikkoṇṭu Ittevarkkuc can=tirātittavarai tirunantā
ṭṭi kāḷi paṇimaṉ Orumaṉ maṉṟāṭiyenukkup pā māraṉāṉa matura maṉṟāṭiyum meṟpaṭic cavaiyāraikkoṇṭu meṟpaṭiyūrār vaippitta tirunantāviḷakku
Digital edition of SII 41.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
